_comment: Copy this to cannon.config.json in your project. DO NOT commit cannon.config.json if it contains secrets.

github._tokenNote: Leave blank — use GITHUB_TOKEN env var or .env file instead. Never put your token here.

postgres.query: SELECT repo, title, body, labels, milestone, priority, track FROM github_backlog WHERE exported = false

mysql.query: SELECT repo, title, body, labels, milestone FROM issues WHERE status = 'pending'

sqlite.query: SELECT repo, title, body, labels, milestone FROM issues
